details.attacks: 2 x weapon (1d4+2 claws or by weapon)
details.special: PSI: Kinetic Fist Powers: 2 Rank: 1st Infravision: 60’ Boneclaw: Once in a very great while, a baazrag is born being much larger than normal. This creature is a boneclaw. The boneclaw stands more than 8 feet tall. HD: 4(18 hp), Att 2 x weapon (1d4+2 claws), MV 60’ XP 125 TT Nil. PSI: Hypnosis, Domination WT: Life Detection Powers: 3 Rank: 2nd. Poisonous Claws: Belgois secret poison when attacking

system.description:
Demihumans who dwell in the most forlorn wastes of Athas. They have a taste for the flesh of intelligent races.
